title: SingleLog batched low-severity flushing
description: Change SingleLog file flushing so trace, debug, and info messages are batched while notice, warning, error, and critical messages flush immediately.
acceptance_criteria: Trace, debug, and info file log entries flush periodically after a deterministic batch threshold of 100 log lines.
Notice, warning, error, and critical file log entries flush immediately.
Existing console flushing behavior remains unchanged.
Docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel are updated.

tasks.title: Update SingleLog flush policy
tasks.description: Modify common/SingleLog.hpp to mark notice-or-higher entries as immediate flush entries and batch lower-severity file flushes every 100 written file entries.
acceptance_criteria: LogIt marks notice, warning, error, and critical messages for immediate flush.
FstreamWriter flushes low-severity entries every 100 file log lines.
Destructor still closes the file cleanly.

unit: Update common_tests/singlelog_test.cpp with GIVEN/WHEN/THEN coverage for 100 batched INFO entries and one immediate NOTICE entry.

tasks.implementation_notes: Updated common/SingleLog.hpp with LowSeverityFlushInterval=100, notice-or-higher immediate flush flags, and a file-writer low-severity counter.

tasks.title: Document and version
tasks.description: Update logging documentation, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel for the batched flush behavior.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md records the SingleLog flush policy change.
docs/logging.md describes the 100-line low-severity flush policy and immediate notice-or-higher flushing.
tasks.implementation_notes: Bumped MODULE.bazel to 0.2.24 and updated CHANGELOG.md plus docs/logging.md for the batched flush policy.
